Package com.linkedin.davinci.client

Class DaVinciRecordTransformer<K,​V,​O>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.linkedin.davinci.client.DaVinciRecordTransformer<K,​V,​O>
  • Type Parameters:
    K - the type of the input key
    V - the type of the input value
    O - the type of the output value
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    BlockingDaVinciRecordTransformer
    @Experimental
public abstract class DaVinciRecordTransformer<K,​V,​O>
extends java.lang.Object
    This abstract class can be extended in order to transform records stored in the Da Vinci Client, or write to a custom storage of your choice. The input is what is consumed from the raw Venice data set, whereas the output is what is stored into Da Vinci's local storage (e.g. RocksDB). Implementations should be thread-safe and support schema evolution. Note: Inputs are wrapped inside Lazy to avoid deserialization costs if not needed.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors

      Lifecycle event triggered after records are done consuming.
      void onRecovery​(org.rocksdb.RocksIterator iterator, StoreBackend storeBackend, java.lang.Integer partition)
      Bootstraps the client after it comes online and onStart() completes.

      Lifecycle event triggered before records are consumed.

      Implement this method to manage custom state outside the Da Vinci Client.

      Implement this method to transform records before they are stored.
      O transformAndProcessPut​(Lazy<K> key, Lazy<V> value)
      Transforms and processes the given record.

    • Constructor Detail

      • DaVinciRecordTransformer

        public DaVinciRecordTransformer​(int storeVersion,
                                boolean storeRecordsInDaVinci)

    • Method Detail

      • getKeyOutputSchema

        public abstract org.apache.avro.Schema getKeyOutputSchema()
        Returns the schema for the key used in DaVinciClient's operations.
        Returns:
        a Schema corresponding to the type of DaVinciRecordTransformer.

      • getValueOutputSchema

        public abstract org.apache.avro.Schema getValueOutputSchema()
        Returns the schema for the output value used in DaVinciClient's operations.
        Returns:
        a Schema corresponding to the type of DaVinciRecordTransformer.

      • transform

        public abstract O transform​(Lazy<K> key,
                            Lazy<V> value)
        Implement this method to transform records before they are stored. This can be useful for tasks such as filtering out unused fields to save storage space.
        Parameters:
        key - the key of the record to be transformed
        value - the value of the record to be transformed
        Returns:
        the transformed value

      • processPut

        public abstract void processPut​(Lazy<K> key,
                                Lazy<O> value)
        Implement this method to manage custom state outside the Da Vinci Client.
        Parameters:
        key - the key of the record to be put
        value - the value of the record to be put, derived from the output of transform(Lazy key, Lazy value)

      • processDelete

        public O processDelete​(Lazy<K> key)
        Override this method to customize the behavior for record deletions. By default, records will be deleted. Return a non-null object to keep the record in storage.
        Parameters:
        key - the key of the record to be deleted
        Returns:
        the object to keep in storage, or null to proceed with the deletion

      • onStart

        public void onStart()
        Lifecycle event triggered before records are consumed. Use this method to perform setup operations such as opening database connections or creating tables. By default, it performs no operation.

      • onEnd

        public void onEnd()
        Lifecycle event triggered after records are done consuming. Use this method to perform cleanup operations such as closing database connections or dropping tables. By default, it performs no operation.

      • transformAndProcessPut

        public final O transformAndProcessPut​(Lazy<K> key,
                                      Lazy<V> value)
        Transforms and processes the given record.
        Parameters:
        key - the key of the record to be put
        value - the value of the record to be put
        Returns:
        the transformed record

      • getValueBytes

        public final java.nio.ByteBuffer getValueBytes​(O value)
        Takes a value, serializes it and wraps it in a ByteByffer.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to be serialized
        Returns:
        a ByteBuffer containing the serialized value wrapped according to Avro specifications

      • getStoreVersion

        public final int getStoreVersion()
        Returns:
        storeVersion

      • getClassHash

        public final int getClassHash()
        Returns:
        the hash of the class bytecode

      • hasTransformationLogicChanged

        public final boolean hasTransformationLogicChanged​(int classHash)
        Returns:
        true if the transformation logic has changed since the last time the class was loaded

      • onRecovery

        public final void onRecovery​(org.rocksdb.RocksIterator iterator,
                             StoreBackend storeBackend,
                             java.lang.Integer partition)
        Bootstraps the client after it comes online and onStart() completes.

      • getStoreRecordsInDaVinci

        public final boolean getStoreRecordsInDaVinci()
        Returns:
        storeRecordsInDaVinci

      • getOutputValueClass

        public final java.lang.Class<O> getOutputValueClass()
